get.summary: Get all users that have role as user

post.summary: Send a message to Gemini AI
post.description: Authenticated user sends a message, receives AI response.

500.description: Internal server error (e.g., AI service failure)

get.summary: Get all chat history for the authenticated user
get.description: Returns an array of chat documents (each containing conversation messages) belonging to the user.

delete.summary: Delete all chat history for the authenticated user
delete.description: Removes every chat document associated with the user (full conversation history).

get.description: Retrieves a list of all events (public).

post.description: Creates an event with an optional image upload. Requires admin JWT token.

401.description: Unauthorized – missing or invalid admin token

get.description: Returns events with a date later than current time.
Returns events with a date earlier than current time.
Returns events between startDate and endDate (query parameters).
Returns events that match the given location string (case‑sensitive ?).
Returns remaining capacity and number of booked tickets (if capacity is set).
Returns a list of all food items. Requires JWT authentication.

post.summary: Create a new food item (Admin only)
post.description: Creates a food item with an optional image upload. Requires both JWT (admin) authentication.

get.description: Returns foods where `featured` is true. Requires JWT authentication.
Returns foods belonging to a specific category. Requires JWT authentication.
Returns all food items linked to a specific attraction. Requires JWT authentication.

get.summary: Get a single food item by ID

get.description: Returns a list of all accommodation options. Requires JWT authentication.

get.summary: Get a single accommodation by ID

get.description: Returns all accommodation options linked to a specific attraction. Requires JWT authentication.

post.description: Creates an accommodation with multiple image uploads. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).

requestBody.description: Fields to update (all optional). Send images to add new ones, or send empty array to keep existing.

images.description: New images to add (existing images are not removed unless deleted separately)

get.description: Returns a list of all activities. Requires JWT authentication.

post.description: Creates an activity with optional image upload. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).

get.summary: Get a single activity by ID

get.description: Returns all activities linked to a specific attraction. Requires JWT authentication.
Returns activities filtered by category. Requires JWT authentication.

get.summary: Get attraction content by attraction ID
get.description: Returns detailed content (overview, location, tips, etc.) for a specific attraction. Requires JWT authentication.

404.description: Content not found for this attraction

post.description: Creates new content for a specific attraction. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).

requestBody.description: Attraction content fields (all strings/arrays as per schema)

400.description: Invalid input or missing required fields

409.description: Content already exists for this attraction

patch.description: Partially updates existing content for a specific attraction. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).

requestBody.description: Fields to update (all optional, same schema as POST)

schema.description: Any fields from AttractionContent schema can be updated

delete.description: Deletes all content for a specific attraction. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).

get.description: Returns a list of all attraction content documents across all attractions. Requires admin JWT (adminJWT).

get.summary: Get travel info by attraction ID
get.description: Returns detailed travel information (nearest city, transport, tips, etc.) for a specific attraction. Requires JWT authentication.

404.description: Travel info not found for this attraction

post.summary: Create or update travel info (Admin only)
post.description: Upsert (create or replace) travel information for a specific attraction. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).

requestBody.description: TravelInfo fields (all except attraction are optional for POST, but nearestCity is required if creating new)

delete.description: Deletes the travel information document for a specific attraction. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).

get.summary: Get travel info by document ID
get.description: Retrieves travel information using its own MongoDB ObjectId (not attraction ID). Requires JWT authentication.
Returns an array of all travel information documents across all attractions. Requires admin JWT (adminJWT).

200.description: List of all travel info entries

get.summary: Get gallery items by attraction ID
get.description: Returns all images/videos for a specific attraction, sorted by order. Requires JWT authentication.

post.summary: Add gallery item to an attraction (Admin only)
post.description: Uploads an image or video (single file) as a gallery item. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).
Accepts a list of gallery item IDs in desired order and updates their 'order' field. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).

requestBody.description: Array of gallery item IDs in new order

orderedIds.description: Ordered list of gallery item ObjectIds

get.summary: Get a single gallery item by ID

put.description: Updates caption, order, or other fields. Requires admin JWT (BothJWT).

get.summary: Get all gallery items across all attractions (Admin only)
get.description: Returns every gallery item in the system. Requires admin JWT (adminJWT).

_id.description: Auto-generated MongoDB ObjectId for this travel info document

url.description: URL of the image or video

publicId.description: Cloudinary public ID for easy deletion
